control_awareness: System enforces amount-based approval thresholds, requester-approver separation, and pre-PO approval requirements.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed to the department head for approval before purchase order issuance.
overall_reason: The purchase need amount is 1,750,000 which requires department head approval. Since there is no quarter-end pressure, a straightforward single purchase request with normal routing is appropriate. This approach respects all preventive controls and aligns with the requester objectives and constraints.
reason: The total purchase amount exceeds 1,000,000, so department head approval is required; creating a single purchase request with normal routing respects the threshold and approval rules.
